summary: Iteration 251 - Login Routing Fix (onboarding_complete: null) Testing. Verified 3 key fixes: (1) _layout.tsx changed !user.onboarding_complete to user.onboarding_complete === false, (2) +html.tsx SW cleanup with sessionStorage-gated reload, (3) login.tsx improved catch block. All 14 backend tests passed. All 3 frontend flows verified via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: _layout.tsx line 65 correctly uses user.onboarding_complete === false (strict equality) instead of !user.onboarding_complete (truthy check that incorrectly redirected null users)
+html.tsx SW cleanup with sessionStorage-gated reload prevents infinite reload loops and clears stale SWs on login page
login.tsx catch block now logs full error details including status, response data, code, and stack for diagnostics
login.tsx also checks onboarding_complete === false (not truthy) before redirecting to complete-profile - consistent with layout fix
Backend /api/auth/login correctly returns onboarding_complete: null for Matt (mjeast1985@gmail.com) - confirms old code was the bug

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Matt login → /home PASS, Admin login → /home PASS, Wrong password error PASS)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login routing fix fully verified. Matt (mjeast1985@gmail.com, onboarding_complete: null) now correctly lands on /home after login. The key fix is in _layout.tsx line 65: user.onboarding_complete === false instead of !user.onboarding_complete. null === false evaluates to false in JS, so null users skip onboarding redirect. +html.tsx SW cleanup prevents stale service workers from intercepting login requests on PWA mobile.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked in test env

backend_api_tests: test_layout_fix_verification - PASSED (null === false → false, no redirect)
frontend_playwright_tests: Matt login (mjeast1985@gmail.com / NavyBean1!) → navigates to /home - PASSED (NOT /onboarding)
Admin login (forest@imosapp.com / Admin123!) → navigates to /home - PASSED
Wrong password (mjeast1985@gmail.com / WrongPassword123!) → 'Invalid email or password' error shown - PASSED

bug_fix_verified.issue: Matt (mjeast1985@gmail.com) could not login via mobile PWA - got redirected to /onboarding instead of home
bug_fix_verified.root_cause: _layout.tsx used !user.onboarding_complete which evaluates to true for null values (not just false). Matt's onboarding_complete is null, causing mobile PWA redirect loop to /onboarding
bug_fix_verified.fix_details: Changed `!user.onboarding_complete` to `user.onboarding_complete === false` — strict equality check means null and undefined correctly skip onboarding redirect
additional_fixes: +html.tsx: SW cleanup with sessionStorage-gated reload prevents infinite reloads after SW unregistration
login.tsx: catch block improved with full error logging (status, data, code, stack) for better mobile PWA diagnostics
bug_fix_verified.verification: 14 backend tests + 3 frontend Playwright tests all pass. Matt lands on /home confirmed.
